name: RChatbot Workspace
description: Workspace for a modern R Shiny chatbot that can answer questions using local files and datasets, generate and execute R code, and display results in the chat interface.
system_prompt: You are assisting with an R Shiny chatbot project. The chatbot can answer questions using local files and datasets, generate and execute R code in a sandbox, and display results interactively. Use the provided context to help with code, architecture, and troubleshooting.

groups.name: Chatbot Interface
groups.description: Files related to the Shiny UI, chat logic, and user interaction.
groups.system_prompt: Focus on the chatbot interface, including Shiny UI and chat logic.

groups.name: File Handling & Dataset Management
groups.description: Files for uploading, parsing, and managing datasets.
groups.system_prompt: Focus on file upload, parsing, and dataset management functionality.

groups.name: Code Generation & Execution
groups.description: Files for generating R code from user queries and executing it in a sandbox.
groups.system_prompt: Focus on code generation and sandboxed execution of R code.

groups.name: Visualization & Output Display
groups.description: Files for displaying tables, plots, and results in the chat.
groups.system_prompt: Focus on visualization and output display modules.

groups.name: Package Integration & Utilities
groups.system_prompt: Focus on utility functions and package integration.

groups.name: Documentation & Example Data
groups.system_prompt: Focus on project documentation and example data.

ui_r.description: Defines the Shiny UI for the chatbot.

server_r.description: Contains the Shiny server logic for the chatbot.

data_upload_module_r.description: Handles file upload and dataset management.

code_exec_module_r.description: Generates R code from user queries and executes it in a sandboxed environment.

viz_module_r.description: Handles visualization of tables and plots in the chat interface.

utils_module_r.description: Utility functions and wrappers for package integration.

sample_csv.description: Example dataset for testing and demonstration.
